steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The word "although" signals a contrast: the government tried to do something, but copies still circulated in secret. The blank must mean an action aimed at stopping or blocking the book's spread.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — replicate: doesn't fit the logic of a government acting against a publication. ✗
  • Choice B — import: implies promotion or encouragement — the opposite of what the contrast requires. ✗
  • Choice C — suppress: to prevent publication or distribution. The government attempted to suppress the novel, but copies still circulated — the contrast holds perfectly. ✓
  • Choice D — critique: doesn't align with the idea of controlling or restricting a publication. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
